subject: ASAP: Data Engineer – Healthcare
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: NordHealth
ROLE: Lead Data Engineer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / hybrid
RATE: 1050 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Python, AWS, Docker and PostgreSQL.

Key requirements:
• Python
• AWS
• Docker
• PostgreSQL

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Niklas Persson
Country Manager
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 70 012 34 56
